name: @nerviq/cli
description: Your agent docs lie. Nerviq finds the lies in 30 seconds: stale references (scripts that don't exist, framework versions that drifted) and cross-platform drift in CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / Cursor rules. Deterministic, zero dependencies. Plus a full governance layer when you want it: 2,441 checks (8 platforms × ~300 rules), 10 languages, 62 domain packs.

scripts.test:all: npm test && npx jest && node test/check-matrix.js && node test/codex-check-matrix.js && node test/gemini-check-matrix.js && node test/copilot-check-matrix.js && node test/cursor-check-matrix.js && node test/windsurf-check-matrix.js && node test/aider-check-matrix.js && node test/opencode-check-matrix.js && node test/golden-matrix.js && node test/codex-golden-matrix.js && node test/gemini-golden-matrix.js && node test/copilot-golden-matrix.js && node test/cursor-golden-matrix.js && node test/windsurf-golden-matrix.js && node test/aider-golden-matrix.js && node test/opencode-golden-matrix.js

author: Nerviq <hello@nerviq.net>
